articles.title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
articles.summary: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. At the same time, government institutions face distinct constraints around security, governance, and operations that set them apart from their business counterparts.

articles.title: Treating enterprise AI as an operating layer
